title: Mastercard Enables AI Agent Payments With Help From Crypto Giants Like Coinbase, Ripple
summary: Mastercard's Agent Pay for Machines lets AI agents buy services and settle transactions using cards, bank accounts, and stablecoins. The system is backed by crypto giants like Coinbase and Ripple, aiming to streamline AI commerce.
body:
Mastercard has introduced Agent Pay for Machines, a system designed to enable AI agents to make payments using traditional cards, bank accounts, and stablecoins. This initiative is supported by major crypto players like Coinbase and Ripple, highlighting the growing intersection of AI and blockchain technology.

The system is intended to facilitate seamless transactions for AI agents, allowing them to purchase services and settle payments without human intervention. Mastercard's collaboration with Coinbase and Ripple underscores the importance of integrating stablecoins and traditional financial tools to support AI-driven commerce.

This development could significantly impact everyday users by making AI transactions more efficient and accessible. For instance, AI-powered personal assistants could handle routine payments, such as subscriptions or utility bills, automatically. This could save time and reduce the need for manual financial management.

Users should watch for broader adoption of AI payment systems in everyday applications. As more services integrate AI agents, the ability to handle payments autonomously could become a standard feature. Keep an eye on announcements from Mastercard and its partners for updates on this technology.
twitterThread: Mastercard just launched Agent Pay for Machines, a payment system for AI agents backed by Coinbase and Ripple. AI can now buy services and settle transactions using cards, bank accounts, and stablecoins.
This means your AI assistant could soon handle routine payments automatically, like subscriptions or bills. No more manual transactions!
Watch for broader adoption of AI payment systems in everyday apps. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-06-10-mastercard-launches-ai-payment-system-with-coinbase-ripple
standaloneTweet: Your AI assistant could soon pay your bills automatically. Mastercard's new Agent Pay for Machines lets AI handle payments using cards, bank accounts, and stablecoins.
